chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI First Appeal No.31 of 2020 Dated Order with signature of Judge Hearing (priority) Case 1. For hearing of Main Case 2. For hearing of CMA No. 2073/2020 (stay) 3. For hearing of CMA No. 2074/2020 (Calling R&PS) (Repeat notice not issued due to counsel for Appellant not approach the office for issuance of notice) Dated 17.01.2024 None present.-.-.-.-.-. Since last few dates the Appellant’s counsel is not depositing the cost required for issuing notices. They have failed in compliance of order dated 01.04.2022 and 06.05.2022, as the matter is again fixed today for non-compliance. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
